mapper.sql: id, device_id, user_id, platform, provider, token, app_version, locale, active, last_seen_at, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO push_devices ( id, device_id, user_id, platform, provider, token, app_version, locale, active, last_seen_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{deviceId}, #{userId}, #{platform}, #{provider}, #{token}, #{appVersion}, #{locale}, #{active}, #{lastSeenAt}, #{createdAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE token = #{token}, platform = #{platform}, app_version = #{appVersion}, locale = #{locale}, active = 1, last_seen_at = NOW(), user_id = COALESCE(#{userId}, user_id)
